caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap with a logo sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. In the background, a white wall features black text and gold stars, including the word "HUSTLE." A red and black logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and a circular logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" are overlaid on the screen. The man is gesturing with his right hand as he speaks, moving his arm from a raised position toward his side across the sequence. He wears a gold chain around his neck and a bracelet on his right wrist. The camera angle remains constant, capturing the man from the waist up as he interacts with someone off-screen.
